summary: Iteration 45 - Notification Engine and Reset Tracker Fixes. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: 1) WebSocket connection shows 'Live updates active' in notification sheet, 2) Notification CRUD endpoints work correctly (GET, POST mark-read, DELETE), 3) Reset tracker flow is simplified (warning -> password -> onboarding wizard, skipping newBalance step), 4) Onboarding wizard shows 'New Trader / Start Fresh' instead of 'I'm New to Merin'.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - chart container sizing issue
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection (WebSocketContext.jsx): Properly connects via /api/ws/{user_id} endpoint with token authentication. Shows 'Live updates active' when connected.

Notification endpoints (server.py lines 5419-5461): GET /api/notifications returns notifications with unread_count, POST /api/notifications/mark-read marks all as read, DELETE /api/notifications clears all.
Reset flow (ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 914-956): Simplified to warning -> password -> onboarding wizard. handleResetConfirm sets resetStep to 'password' directly, skipping 'newBalance' step.
Onboarding wizard (OnboardingWizard.jsx line 387): Shows 'New Trader / Start Fresh' text as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 2 user-reported issues have been fixed: 1) Notification engine - WebSocket connection now shows 'Live updates active' instead of 'Connection lost', notifications are persisted to MongoDB and fetched on connect. 2) Reset tracker - simplified flow (warning -> password -> onboarding wizard), and onboarding wizard shows 'New Trader / Start Fresh' instead of 'I'm New to Merin'. Minor console warnings exist for chart sizing and dialog accessibility but don't affect functionality.

websocket_connection.details: WebSocket connects successfully via /api/ws/{user_id} endpoint. Console shows 'WebSocket connected'. Notification sheet shows 'Live updates active'.

notification_get_endpoint.details: GET /api/notifications returns notifications array, unread_count, and total. Supports limit and unread_only params.

notification_mark_read_endpoint.details: POST /api/notifications/mark-read marks all notifications as read. Returns marked_read count.

notification_clear_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/notifications clears all notifications for user. Returns deleted count.

reset_tracker_simplified_flow.details: Reset dialog flow: Step 1 (Warning) -> Step 2 (Password) -> Onboarding Wizard. No 'newBalance' step.

onboarding_wizard_new_trader_text.details: Onboarding wizard Step 1 shows 'New Trader / Start Fresh' instead of 'I'm New to Merin'.

verify_password_endpoint.details: POST /api/auth/verify-password correctly validates user password for reset flow.

api_tests.DELETE /api/profit/reset: PASS - Endpoint exists and requires auth
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns account value and profit data

ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Master admin can login successfully
ui_tests.profit_tracker_navigation: PASS - Can navigate to Profit Tracker page
ui_tests.reset_tracker_dialog_step1: PASS - Shows warning with list of data to be deleted
ui_tests.reset_tracker_dialog_step2: PASS - Goes directly to password verification (simplified)
